epochs.name: Docker CI
epochs.description: Anneal CI built, pulled, and ran through Docker images.

epochs.name: Free-tier GitHub-hosted runners
epochs.description: Anneal jobs moved from larger runners to ubuntu-latest.

epochs.name: Nix archive fan-out
epochs.description: Anneal CI builds one Nix-produced toolchain archive and fans it out as a workflow artifact.

epochs.name: Canonical main publishing only
epochs.description: Benchmark history is only published from google/zerocopy main pushes.

workflow.wall_seconds.name: Workflow Wall Time
workflow.wall_seconds.description: Observed elapsed time from the first job start to the last job completion.

workflow.queue_seconds.name: Workflow Queue Time
workflow.queue_seconds.description: Elapsed time from run creation to run start.

workflow.total_seconds.name: Workflow Total Time
workflow.total_seconds.description: Elapsed time from run creation to workflow completion.

workflow.runner_seconds.name: Runner Time
workflow.runner_seconds.description: Sum of all completed job durations.

workflow.critical_path_seconds.name: Critical Path
workflow.critical_path_seconds.description: Longest dependency path through the Anneal workflow using observed job durations.

legacy.docker_image_size.mb.name: Docker Image Size
legacy.docker_image_size.mb.retired_reason: Docker images were replaced by the Nix archive fan-out path in 88393fcf1.

legacy.docker_build_time.seconds.name: Docker Build Time
legacy.docker_build_time.seconds.retired_reason: Docker images were replaced by the Nix archive fan-out path in 88393fcf1.

legacy.docker_pull_time.seconds.name: Docker Pull Time
legacy.docker_pull_time.seconds.retired_reason: Docker pull time was replaced by artifact download and archive setup metrics.

legacy.anneal_tests_job_duration.seconds.name: Anneal Tests Job Duration
legacy.anneal_tests_job_duration.seconds.retired_reason: Previously named Total CI Duration (All Steps), but it measured only the Anneal Tests job.

legacy.test_time.seconds.name: Test Time
legacy.test_time.seconds.retired_reason: Replaced by step.anneal_tests.run_all_tests.seconds with explicit source and epoch metadata.
